author: meloyellowjr
name: VU Stereo Meter
description: Analog VU stereo meters in 8 legendary power amplifier styles. Uses real iCUE sensor data for left and right channels. Themes: Onkyo M-508, McIntosh MC312, Accuphase P-4600, Yamaha M-5000, Technics SE-R1, Advance Paris A10, Nikko Alpha 800, Proton D1200.
